# BTC Benchmark

This task workspace tracks the task contract and the AI scientist operating structure. Experiment products are local logs and are ignored by repo Git.

- `task.yaml`: task contract, metric, constraints, source refs, and curated asset declarations.
- `loop.yaml`: runnable AI scientist loop.
- `scientist.md`: agent-facing instructions.
- `bin/`: maintained task-specific helper scripts.
- `code/`: ignored local experiment code.
- `results/`: ignored local experiment results.
- `plots/`: ignored local experiment plots.
- `reports/`: ignored local experiment reports.
- `runs/`: ignored raw run output.
- `assets/`: ignored local task assets.
